messages.content:
Specifying the order in which statements are to be executed in a computer program is called _______________.

a.
an algorithm

b.
transfer of control

c.
program control

d.
Pseudocode
b. transfer of control

Using an incorrect relational operator or using an incorrect final value of a loop counter in the condition of a while or for statement is a frequent cause of __________errors.

a.
off-by-one

b.
compilation

c.
syntax

d.
divide-by-zero
a. off-by-one

Which of these is not a valid identifier?

a.
a_valid_identifier

b.
a_valid_identifier_

c.
1_valid_identifier

d.
a1_valid_identifier
c. 1_valid_identifier. Identifiers cannot begin with a numeric digit.

The ______________ selection statement performs an action if a condition is true and performs a different action if the condition is false.

a.
if... else

b.
when

c.
if

d.
switch
a. if...else

What is the "ultimate goal" of the field of artificial intelligence?

a.
Computer vision.

b.
Self-driving cars.

c.
Computers learning from massive amounts of data.

d.
Artificial general intelligence-computers that perform intelligence tasks as well as humans.
d. Artificial general intelligence-computers that perform intelligence tasks as well as humans.

Which of the following statements is true?

a.
You should never check the return value of function scanf.

b.
You should check the return value of function scanf to ensure that the value it returns matches the number of items that should have been input.

c.
Function scanf does not return a value.

d.
None of the above.
b. You should check the return value of function scanf to ensure that the value it returns matches the number of items that should have been input.
c. OSTIM
c. Counter value is equal to 3.
